MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-20-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW PROBABLE VALIDITY OF HER CLAIMS. EVIDENCE, JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE MATERIALS, AND PRIOR ACTIONS SHOW THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT PREVAIL ON HER CLAIMS. THE COURT NOTES THAT THE CLAIMS LARGELY CONTRACT, NOT REAL PROPERTY. THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FESS ARE GRANTED AS SET FORTH. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Hannon (appearing via court call), Esq., 831-476-8005, appearing for Denise Beatty, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Andrew Mase (appearing via court call), Esq. of The Ryan Firm, 949-263-1800, appearing for US National Bank, Defendant and moving party.

ARGUED. Mr. Mase presented his oral argument in support of his request for attorney's fees. Mr. Hannon provided case background.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the modified tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to show probable validity of her claims. Evidence, judicially noticeable materials, and prior actions show that Plaintiff cannot prevail on her claims. The Court notes that the claims largely contract, not real property. The request for attorney's fess are granted as set forth. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Advanced From Feb-19-19 To Feb-08-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Continued To Feb-20-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: continued to February 20, 2019 on Court's own motion. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Feb-08-2019 Continued To Feb-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is continued to February 15, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than Febuary 8, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (NOTE: The Court is aware the this matter had been advanced. No courtesy copies of the moving papers were received for either of the hearing dates). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
